sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 89 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.139/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hashim, advocate holding brief for Mr. Ali Tahir, advocate for the applicant. On the last date, adjournment was sought on behalf of applicant’s counsel and a fixed date was given. Despite the same, once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
